description: Caller starts in English then switches to Marathi mid-call; primary language resolves to 'mr'. Books a visit.
transcript:
Agent: Hi Sachin, this is Priya from Kalpataru about the Thane project. Is now okay?
Caller: Yes yes. Actually... marathi madhe bolu shakto ka?
Agent: Nakkich. Aapan 2 BHK baddal bolto aahot, 85 lakh paasun. Visit kadhi karu shakta?
Caller: Shanivari sakali bara vajta yeto.
Agent: Mast, Saturday 12pm fix kela. Dhanyavaad!
Caller: Dhanyavaad.

Call Outcome.subjective: Switched to Marathi, agreed to Saturday noon visit.
